nodes.name: Joseph Wolf
nodes.summary: Joseph Wolf是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Halmahera rain forests
nodes.summary: The Halmahera rain forests is a tropical moist forest ecoregion in Indonesia.

nodes.name: 西哈马黑拉县
nodes.summary: 西哈马黑拉县是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联211种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等211种鸟类。

nodes.name: Gerd Heinrich
nodes.summary: Gerd Heinrich是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 湿地
nodes.summary: 浅水、沼泽与植被斑块组成的高生产力生态系统。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 哈马黑拉岛
nodes.summary: 哈马黑拉岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鹤形目
nodes.summary: 鹤形目（Gruiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联126种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、灰冠鹤、Grey-winged trumpeter等126种鸟类。

nodes.name: 华氏秧鸡
nodes.summary: 华氏秧鸡（Invisible rail，学名 Gallirallus wallacii），分类上属于鹤形目，并归入秧鸡科，在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括沼泽、湿地。

nodes.name: 卡奥
nodes.summary: 卡奥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括华氏秧鸡，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 秧鸡科
nodes.summary: 秧鸡科（Rallidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Tsingy forest rail、Madagascar forest rail、Chestnut forest rail等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: 喬治·羅伯特·格雷
nodes.summary: 喬治·羅伯特·格雷是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括褐鸭、銀鴿、Pink-bellied imperial pigeon等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Claims that the rail occurs in alang-alang grass are thought to have arisen from confusion with the pale-vented bush-hen. German ornithologist Gerd Heinrich, who prepared for his Halmahera trip by rolling in stinging nettles, wrote of the sago swamp habitat in the 1930s: I am solidly confident no European has ever seen this rail alive, for that requires such a degree of toughening and such demands on oneself as I cannot so easily attribute to others

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sightings of the rail from 1950 to 2003 were from a restricted area of West Halmahera Regency, at the base of the western peninsula of the island, but it was recorded prior to 1950 as far as the southern point of Halmahera. More recent records showed that it is still present in a significantly larger area, including the northeast of the island, and locals claim that it also occurs in the swamps near Kao, in the northwest. The invisible rail is highly dependent on sago swamp habitats, which are increasingly under threat from human activities

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Sightings of the rail from 1950 to 2003 were from a restricted area of West Halmahera Regency, at the base of the western peninsula of the island, but it was recorded prior to 1950 as far as the southern point of Halmahera. More recent records showed that it is still present in a significantly larger area, including the northeast of the island, and locals claim that it also occurs in the swamps near Kao, in the northwest. The invisible rail is highly dependent on sago swamp habitats, which are increasingly under threat from human activities

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The invisible rail, Wallace's rail, or drummer rail (Gallirallus wallacii) is a large flightless rail that is endemic to the island of Halmahera in Northern Maluku, Indonesia, where it inhabits impenetrable sago swamps adjacent to forests

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Habitat loss has occurred through the harvesting of sago and conversion of the wetlands to rice cultivation, and the rail is eaten by local people
